title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! What a haul! You're awesome!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. Do ya mind if I give these to my little
brothers back home?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I know they'll be super happy, and I wanna brag
to 'em about ya!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell 'em you're really cool and super good at
games and stuff!
